llmMessages.query: --deep Show me a Markov distribution for gold (GLD) over 30 days using Polymarket anchors.
llmMessages.answer:
## GLD 30-Day Markov Distribution

**Current Price:** $414.58 (Mar 30, 2026 close)  
**Regime:** Sideways with structural break detected ⚠️  
**Horizon:** 30 trading days

### Probability Distribution

| Price Level | P(>Price) | 90% Confidence Interval |
|-------------|-----------|-------------------------|
| $356 | 99.9% | [99.8%–100.0%] |
| $378 | 97.2% | [95.0%–99.2%] |
| $390 | 90.2% | [85.4%–94.9%] |
| $402 | 74.9% | [68.1%–82.1%] |
| $414 (current) | 52.0% | [44.4%–59.7%] |
| $420 | 39.7% | [32.1%–47.3%] |
| $427 | 28.4% | [21.1%–35.6%] |
| $440 | 11.6% | [6.5%–17.0%] |
| $453 | 3.5% | [1.2%–6.3%] |
| $467 | 0.7% | [0.0%–1.7%] |

### Key Findings

- **Median 30-day forecast:** ~$414 (roughly flat, 52% probability of staying above current level)
- **Downside skew:** 25% probability of falling below $402 (~3% decline)
- **Upside limited:** Only 11.6% probability of exceeding $440 (+6%)
- **Tail risk:** 0.7% probability of reaching $467 (+13%)

### Model Warnings ⚠️

1. **Structural break detected** (divergence=1.418) — the sharp decline from $495 (Jan 29) to $414 (Mar 30) represents a regime shift that widens confidence intervals by 50%
2. **Zero trusted Polymarket anchors** — the GC futures markets ($3,600-$7,000 thresholds) didn't map cleanly to GLD price levels, so the distribution is 100% Markov-model driven
3. **Sparse bear-state observations** — transition probabilities are prior-dominated due to limited historical data in the current declining regime

### Interpretation

The model suggests **range-bound trading with downside bias** over the next 30 days. The structural break warning reflects gold's recent correction from its January 2026 peak (~$509) and indicates elevated uncertainty. Without liquid Polymarket anchors at GLD-specific price levels, the forecast relies entirely on historical regime transitions.

**Practical read:** Expect continued volatility in the $390-$440 range (68% confidence), with a modest tilt toward further consolidation rather than recovery.

---
**Sources**
1. https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/GLD/history/
2. https://twelvedata.com/markets/163377/etf/nyse/gld/historical-data
3. https://stockanalysis.com/etf/gld/history/
4. https://www.macrotrends.net/stocks/charts/GLD/spdr-gold-shares/stock-price-history
5. https://exa.ai/library/markets/commodity/wti?date=2026-03-31&t=69cbbeb69509b4a72328c240
llmMessages.summary: The 30-day Markov model forecasts GLD to remain roughly flat around $414 with a downside skew, though confidence is reduced due to a detected structural break and absence of Polymarket anchors. Probability tables indicate a 52% chance of staying above current levels versus only an 11.6% chance of exceeding $440.

llmMessages.query: --deep Show me a Markov distribution for bitcoin over 30 days using Polymarket anchors.
llmMessages.answer:
## BTC 30-Day Markov Distribution

**Current Price:** $66,750 | **Horizon:** 30 days | **Regime:** Sideways

### Key Probability Levels

| Price Level | P(> Price) | Interpretation |
|-------------|------------|----------------|
| $57,400 | 99.2% | Extreme floor — nearly certain support |
| $60,000 | 95.0% | Strong support zone |
| $65,700 | 64.5% | Mild downside risk from here |
| $66,750 (current) | ~56% | Roughly even odds at current level |
| $68,700 | 37.7% | Modest upside resistance |
| $70,800 | 7.3% | Low probability breakout |
| $77,500 | 1.6% | Extreme upside tail |

### Distribution Shape

```
BTC 30-Day Probability Distribution (Markov + Polymarket Anchors)
                                                                  
  >$77K   ░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░  1.6%                            
$70–$77K  █░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░  7.3%                            
$67–$70K  ██████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░  29.4%                           
$65–$67K  ██████████████░░░░░░  55.7%  ◄ current                 
$60–$65K  ████████████████████  94.9%                           
  <$60K   ████████████████████  99.2%                           
```

### Model Diagnostics

| Metric | Value | Interpretation |
|--------|-------|----------------|
| Anchors Used | 5 | Trusted Polymarket markets |
| R²_OS | -0.006 | Markov adds no value over mean — anchors dominate |
| Structural Break | ⚠️ Yes (divergence 0.78) | CI widened 50% |
| Mixing Weight | 100% Anchors | Model relies entirely on Polymarket odds |

### Bottom Line

The crowd-implied distribution is **range-bound with slight downside bias**:

- **Base case (56%):** BTC trades sideways between $65K–$68K
- **Downside protection:** 95% confidence BTC stays above $60K
- **Upside capped:** Only 7% chance of exceeding $71K in 30 days
- **Tail risk:** <2% probability of a moonshot above $77K

⚠️ **Warning:** Structural break detected — the model detected regime divergence between historical patterns and current Polymarket anchors. Confidence intervals are widened accordingly. Treat this as a **crowd-sourced expectation** rather than a purely statistical forecast.

**Source:** Polymarket prediction markets (real-money odds) + 90-day price history. Data as of March 31, 2026.

---
**Sources**
1. https://api.financialdatasets.ai/crypto/prices/snapshot/?ticker=BTC-USD
2. https://api.financialdatasets.ai/crypto/prices/?ticker=BTC-USD&interval=day&interval_multiplier=1&start_date=2025-12-31&end_date=2026-03-31
llmMessages.summary: The 30-day Bitcoin forecast predicts a sideways regime with a 95% probability of staying above $60,000 from the current $66,750 level. However, diagnostics indicate the Markov component adds no predictive value, relying entirely on Polymarket anchors due to a structural break.

args.thought: I have GLD current price ($414.70 as of Mar 27, 2026) and some Polymarket gold markets. The Polymarket markets are for GC (gold futures) not GLD directly, but they're correlated. GC futures typically trade at ~$100x the gold spot price per ounce, so I need to convert thresholds. Current gold spot is roughly $2,700-2,800/oz based on the markets shown. GLD is designed to track 1/10th of gold spot price, so GLD ~$414 implies gold spot ~$2,760/oz. The GC futures markets show thresholds like $3,600-$7,000 which are futures contract values (100 oz contracts). I need to map these to GLD equivalents or use them as anchors for the Markov model. Let me fetch more historical prices from one of the URLs to get a proper 60-day series.

args.thought:
I have sufficient data now:

1. **GLD Historical Prices** (from web_fetch, Jan-Mar 2026): ~50 trading days of daily closes, ranging from ~$421 to $509, current ~$414.58

2. **Polymarket Gold Anchors** (GC futures, need to convert to GLD):
   - GC thresholds are per-ounce futures prices
   - GLD ≈ GC / 10 (GLD tracks 1/10th of gold spot)
   - Current GLD $414.58 → implies gold ~$4,140/oz
   
   Converting Polymarket GC thresholds to GLD:
   - $3,600 GC → $360 GLD (P(hit low by Mar): 0.1%)
   - $4,000 GC → $400 GLD (P(hit low by Mar): 0.2%)
   - $4,300 GC → $430 GLD (P(hit low by Mar): 1.3%)
   - $5,400 GC → $540 GLD (P(hit high by Mar): 0.1%)
   - $5,500 GC → $550 GLD (P(hit high by Jun): 28.4%)
   - $6,000 GC → $600 GLD (P(hit high by Jun): 12.5%)
   - $7,000 GC → $700 GLD (P(hit high by Jun): 3.1%)

3. **For markov_distribution tool**, I need:
   - ticker: "GLD"
   - horizon: 30 (trading days)
   - historicalPrices: array of daily closes (oldest first)
   - polymarketMarkets: array with question, probability, volume

history.answer:
## GLD 30-Day Markov Distribution

**Current Price:** $414.58 (Mar 30, 2026 close)  
**Regime:** Sideways with structural break detected ⚠️  
**Horizon:** 30 trading days

### Probability Distribution

| Price Level | P(>Price) | 90% Confidence Interval |
|-------------|-----------|-------------------------|
| $356 | 99.9% | [99.8%–100.0%] |
| $378 | 97.2% | [95.0%–99.2%] |
| $390 | 90.2% | [85.4%–94.9%] |
| $402 | 74.9% | [68.1%–82.1%] |
| $414 (current) | 52.0% | [44.4%–59.7%] |
| $420 | 39.7% | [32.1%–47.3%] |
| $427 | 28.4% | [21.1%–35.6%] |
| $440 | 11.6% | [6.5%–17.0%] |
| $453 | 3.5% | [1.2%–6.3%] |
| $467 | 0.7% | [0.0%–1.7%] |

### Key Findings

- **Median 30-day forecast:** ~$414 (roughly flat, 52% probability of staying above current level)
- **Downside skew:** 25% probability of falling below $402 (~3% decline)
- **Upside limited:** Only 11.6% probability of exceeding $440 (+6%)
- **Tail risk:** 0.7% probability of reaching $467 (+13%)

### Model Warnings ⚠️

1. **Structural break detected** (divergence=1.418) — the sharp decline from $495 (Jan 29) to $414 (Mar 30) represents a regime shift that widens confidence intervals by 50%
2. **Zero trusted Polymarket anchors** — the GC futures markets ($3,600-$7,000 thresholds) didn't map cleanly to GLD price levels, so the distribution is 100% Markov-model driven
3. **Sparse bear-state observations** — transition probabilities are prior-dominated due to limited historical data in the current declining regime

### Interpretation

The model suggests **range-bound trading with downside bias** over the next 30 days. The structural break warning reflects gold's recent correction from its January 2026 peak (~$509) and indicates elevated uncertainty. Without liquid Polymarket anchors at GLD-specific price levels, the forecast relies entirely on historical regime transitions.

**Practical read:** Expect continued volatility in the $390-$440 range (68% confidence), with a modest tilt toward further consolidation rather than recovery.

---
**Sources**
1. https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/GLD/history/
2. https://twelvedata.com/markets/163377/etf/nyse/gld/historical-data
3. https://stockanalysis.com/etf/gld/history/
4. https://www.macrotrends.net/stocks/charts/GLD/spdr-gold-shares/stock-price-history
5. https://exa.ai/library/markets/commodity/wti?date=2026-03-31&t=69cbbeb69509b4a72328c240

history.answer:
## BTC 30-Day Markov Distribution

**Current Price:** $66,750 | **Horizon:** 30 days | **Regime:** Sideways

### Key Probability Levels

| Price Level | P(> Price) | Interpretation |
|-------------|------------|----------------|
| $57,400 | 99.2% | Extreme floor — nearly certain support |
| $60,000 | 95.0% | Strong support zone |
| $65,700 | 64.5% | Mild downside risk from here |
| $66,750 (current) | ~56% | Roughly even odds at current level |
| $68,700 | 37.7% | Modest upside resistance |
| $70,800 | 7.3% | Low probability breakout |
| $77,500 | 1.6% | Extreme upside tail |

### Distribution Shape

```
BTC 30-Day Probability Distribution (Markov + Polymarket Anchors)
                                                                  
  >$77K   ░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░  1.6%                            
$70–$77K  █░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░  7.3%                            
$67–$70K  ██████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░  29.4%                           
$65–$67K  ██████████████░░░░░░  55.7%  ◄ current                 
$60–$65K  ████████████████████  94.9%                           
  <$60K   ████████████████████  99.2%                           
```

### Model Diagnostics

| Metric | Value | Interpretation |
|--------|-------|----------------|
| Anchors Used | 5 | Trusted Polymarket markets |
| R²_OS | -0.006 | Markov adds no value over mean — anchors dominate |
| Structural Break | ⚠️ Yes (divergence 0.78) | CI widened 50% |
| Mixing Weight | 100% Anchors | Model relies entirely on Polymarket odds |

### Bottom Line

The crowd-implied distribution is **range-bound with slight downside bias**:

- **Base case (56%):** BTC trades sideways between $65K–$68K
- **Downside protection:** 95% confidence BTC stays above $60K
- **Upside capped:** Only 7% chance of exceeding $71K in 30 days
- **Tail risk:** <2% probability of a moonshot above $77K

⚠️ **Warning:** Structural break detected — the model detected regime divergence between historical patterns and current Polymarket anchors. Confidence intervals are widened accordingly. Treat this as a **crowd-sourced expectation** rather than a purely statistical forecast.

**Source:** Polymarket prediction markets (real-money odds) + 90-day price history. Data as of March 31, 2026.

---
**Sources**
1. https://api.financialdatasets.ai/crypto/prices/snapshot/?ticker=BTC-USD
2. https://api.financialdatasets.ai/crypto/prices/?ticker=BTC-USD&interval=day&interval_multiplier=1&start_date=2025-12-31&end_date=2026-03-31
